children.title: Overview
children.prompt: What is GodeX, why it exists, how it transforms any LLM provider into an OpenAI-compatible Responses API gateway. Cover the core value proposition: request bridging, model aliasing, session chains, and streaming translation. Source: [src/index.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/index.ts), [package.json](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/package.json), [README.md](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/README.md)

children.title: Quick Start
children.prompt: Install, configure, and run GodeX in 5 minutes. Cover godex init, godex.yaml setup, API key configuration, running the server, and making first requests. Source: [src/cli/commands/init.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/cli/commands/init.ts), [src/cli/cli.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/cli/cli.ts), [godex.yaml](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/godex.yaml)

children.title: CLI Reference
children.prompt: Complete reference for godex CLI commands: init, serve, config check, config print. Cover flags, options, environment variables, and runtime config. Source: [src/cli/program.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/cli/program.ts), [src/cli/commands/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/cli/commands/), [src/cli/runtime-config/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/cli/runtime-config/)

children.title: Architecture
children.prompt: System architecture overview: layered design with CLI → ApplicationContext → Bun Server → Responses Pipeline → Bridge Kernel → Provider Edge. Cover the core flow, dependency graph, and module responsibilities. Source: [src/context/application-context.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/context/application-context.ts), [src/responses/runtime.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/responses/runtime.ts), [src/server/server.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/server/server.ts)

children.title: Bridge Kernel
children.prompt: The Responses-to-Chat bridge kernel: compatibility planning, request building, tool planning, output contracts, response reconstruction, and stream state machine. This is the core translation layer. Source: [src/bridge/request/request-builder.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/request/request-builder.ts), [src/bridge/compatibility/planner.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/compatibility/planner.ts), [src/bridge/tools/tool-plan.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/tools/tool-plan.ts), [src/bridge/response/response-reconstructor.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/response/response-reconstructor.ts), [src/bridge/stream/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/stream/)

children.title: Provider Development
children.prompt: How to add a new provider: ProviderSpec, ProviderEdge, hooks, protocol DTOs, capabilities declaration, and conformance testing. Cover the factory pattern and registrar. Source: [src/providers/registrar.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/providers/registrar.ts), [src/providers/definition.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/providers/definition.ts), [src/providers/deepseek/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/providers/deepseek/), [src/providers/zhipu/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/providers/zhipu/), [src/bridge/provider-spec/contract.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/provider-spec/contract.ts)

children.title: Streaming Pipeline
children.prompt: The streaming pipeline: ProviderExchange, StreamPipeline, composable TransformStream stages, stream state machine, delta mapping, SSE encoding, and the transform chain order. Source: [src/responses/stream-pipeline.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/responses/stream-pipeline.ts), [src/responses/provider-exchange.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/responses/provider-exchange.ts), [src/responses/stream-transforms/](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/responses/stream-transforms/), [src/bridge/stream/stream-reconstructor.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/bridge/stream/stream-reconstructor.ts)

children.title: Session Management
children.prompt: Session chains: previous_response_id resolution, chain validation (cycles, depth, incomplete), memory and SQLite stores, save policies, and snapshot cloning. Source: [src/session/chain.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/session/chain.ts), [src/session/memory.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/session/memory.ts), [src/session/sqlite.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/session/sqlite.ts), [src/session/save-policy.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/session/save-policy.ts)

children.title: Configuration
children.prompt: godex.yaml configuration: schema, sections, env interpolation, defaults, validation, paths resolution, and CLI overrides. Source: [src/config/schema.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/config/schema.ts), [src/config/reader.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/config/reader.ts), [src/config/env-interpolation.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/config/env-interpolation.ts), [godex.yaml](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/godex.yaml)

children.title: Trace & Observability
children.prompt: Trace system: async recorder, SQLite storage, payload capture, event types (request, usage, event, error), queue management, and the NoopTraceRecorder fallback. Source: [src/trace/recorder.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/trace/recorder.ts), [src/trace/sqlite.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/trace/sqlite.ts), [src/trace/types.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/trace/types.ts)

children.title: Error Handling
children.prompt: GodeXError hierarchy: ServerError, BridgeError, ProviderError, SessionError. Domain codes, structured logging, and error flow through the pipeline. Source: [src/error/godex-error.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/error/godex-error.ts), [src/error/codes.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/error/codes.ts), [src/error/server-error.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/error/server-error.ts), [src/error/bridge-error.ts](https://github.com/Ahoo-Wang/GodeX/blob/main/src/error/bridge-error.ts)
